title: T-040 — UI: TEC-023 BOM Version Diff view (PARTIAL prototype)
prompt: Build BOM Version Diff side-by-side view (TEC-023, §7.5). Reuse data from T-015 diff endpoint. Visual reference is `bom_versions_tab` at design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:373-468 (PARTIAL — embedded version timeline) — extend to dedicated diff panel under /technical/boms/[id]/diff. Side-by-side columns Header / Lines / Co-products with added/removed/changed highlighting. RED tests/ui/tec-023-bom-diff.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-023-bom-diff.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Side-by-side BOM version diff view. PARTIAL prototype anchor extended.
pipeline_inputs.details: Empty/all-equal state copy 'No differences'. Color tokens: added=success, removed=destructive, changed=warning per design tokens. Routes from Versions tab in TEC-021 (T-038).
acceptance_criteria: Given the diff view renders for v1 vs v2, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:373-468 (versions tab), then layout primitives + side-by-side regions follow the prototype patterns — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL with parity checklist embedded in details.
Given the API returns empty diff, when rendered, then 'No differences' state shows.
Given a removed line, when rendered, then it appears under the 'Removed' region with destructive color token.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + empty state + color tokens.
risk_red_lines: Do not call backend repeatedly — use single GET /diff.
